case_title: AGUILAR, FRANKE VS EXCELSIOR AUTO CARE

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO FRANKE AGUILAR RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, FRANKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXCELSIOR AUTO CARE DEFT SHALL RETURN PLTF'S AUTOMOBILE UPON PLTF PAYING $722 TO DEFT WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, FRANKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXCELSIOR AUTO CARE DEFT. EXCELSIOR DOES NOT OWE PLTF ANY MONEY ON PLTF'S CLAIM. DEFT.
